commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer labeling keeps this in a human-handled review lane, and there is no narrow automated repair defect to queue.; Cleared: The diff touches path-safety-sensitive plugin package metadata, but it preserves the package.json realpath-inside-root guard and adds no dependency, CI, or secret-handling surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds per-operation realpath caches to installed plugin index record building and installed manifest registry reconstruction, plus an Unreleased changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +30, Docs +1. Total +31 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main resolves plugin package roots and package.json paths repeatedly without a cache in the touched paths. I did not rerun the CPU scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer labeling keeps this in a human-handled review lane, and there is no narrow automated repair defect to queue.
